body.body: See GitHub issue #331. Build primitives.json registry with id/ctx_reads/ctx_writes/description/category per primitive. Add validate_step(). Identify 2+ missing primitives.
body.title: T-primitive-registry: Catalog and standardize the primitive interface
body.result: T-primitive-registry implemented: (1) tools/primitives.json — 9 implemented primitives (3 control_flow builtins + 6 os_primitives) with id/category/ctx_reads/ctx_writes/args/source/description per entry; 4 missing primitives cataloged (prim_count, prim_format, prim_filter, prim_log) with priority+reason; (2) schema_runner.py extended with load_primitives_catalog(), load_missing_primitives(), validate_step() (checks builtin arg shapes + op validity + catalog membership), validate_schema_habit() (full habit validation with duplicate step detection). All assertions pass; PROC_SCAN_DIR validates clean.
